name: Schnecken
recipeInstructions:
1. Place the first four ingredients in a food processor and process into dough. Divide into 4 balls. Refrigerate overnight.
2. On a floured surface, roll one ball of dough at a time into a 10-12 inch circle, 1/8 inch thick. Cut into 12 pie sections.
3. Have the preserves, cinnamon & sugar, nuts, and raisins ready in separate containers.
4. Spread preserves onto the pie sections. Sprinkle cinnamon & sugar and nuts and raisins on the outer edges. Roll each section from the circle edge to the point.
5. Place the sections close together on a lightly greased cookie sheet; touching. Bake at 350°F until lightly browned.
6. Flip with a spatula onto waxed paper. Let cool. Before serving, sprinkle with powdered sugar. The rolls can be frozen at this point.
